requirement_topic.en: Outdoor-Noise Marking and Harmonic Regime Scope
requirement_topic.zh: 户外噪声标识与制度范围
requirement_topic.zht: 戶外噪聲標識與制度範圍

summary.en: Morocco does not operate an EU-style outdoor-noise marking regime for power tools as a mandatory market access condition. Unlike the EU, there is no harmonised rule in this lane that requires a listed-equipment noise label or guaranteed sound-power declaration for market entry.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥没有欧盟式户外噪声标识制度作为市场准入强制条件。与欧盟不同，本通道未见要求按列名设备噪声标签或保证声功率申报作为入场条件。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥沒有歐盟式戶外噪聲標識制度作為市場准入強制條件。與歐盟不同，本通道未見要求按列名設備噪聲標籤或保證聲功率申報作為入場條件。

standards_or_laws: No equivalent mandatory Moroccan regime matching EU outdoor-noise marking obligations
Workplace and use-site noise control generally remains under labor and occupational-safety enforcement

summary.en: Chinese power-tool documentation usually includes safety and EMC reporting but rarely treats outdoor-noise market marking as a separate legal gate in the same way as EU directives. This is therefore largely a regime-coverage comparison rather than a direct technical gap.
summary.zh: 中国电动工具文件通常包含安全与EMC报告，但并未以欧盟指令式的户外噪声标识作为市场准入独立法定义门槛。该点更属于制度覆盖面比较，而非单纯技术缺陷。
summary.zht: 中國電動工具文件通常包含安全與EMC報告，但並未以歐盟指令式的戶外噪聲標識作為市場准入獨立法定門檻。該點更屬制度覆蓋面比較，而非單純技術缺陷。

standards_or_laws: China export documentation practices for power tools
General Chinese noise reporting in technical files where present

gap.en: There is not a direct Morocco noise-marking gap to close in this row, but there is a misconception risk: some exporters assume a product-level EU-style noise file is still mandatory. The realistic gap is instead to ensure workplace exposure and local use-site expectations are handled in the buyer/importer context.
gap.zh: 该项不存在可直接填补的摩洛哥噪声标识缺口，但存在误判风险：部分出口商误以为仍需提供欧盟式产品级噪声文件。现实差距是将使用场所的职业噪声与现场控制要求在买卖双方现场合规中落实。
gap.zht: 該項不存在可直接填補的摩洛哥噪聲標識缺口，但存在誤判風險：部分出口商誤以為仍需提供歐盟式產品級噪聲文件。實際差距是將使用場所的職業噪聲與現場控制要求在買賣雙方現場合規中落實。

mandatory_status.target: No mandatory product-level outdoor-noise marking regime equivalent to EU obligations for Morocco under the power-tool lane. Compliance focus is typically in imported product responsibility and occupational workplace controls.
mandatory_status.cn: No mandatory EU-style outdoor-noise marking in China for this lane as a general power-tool condition.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No standalone noise-marking obligation for Morocco in this lane. Exporters should avoid assuming EU Directive style outdoor noise evidence is required; focus instead on importer-side controls for workplace and use-site compliance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 本通道下摩洛哥不存在独立噪声标识义务。出口商不应误判为仍需遵循欧盟式户外噪声证据，重点应放在进口商端承担的职业和现场使用义务沟通上。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 本通道下摩洛哥不存在獨立噪聲標識義務。出口商不應誤判仍需遵循歐盟式戶外噪聲證據，重點應放在進口商端承擔的職業和現場使用義務溝通上。
